title: $:/plugins/wikilabs/new-style
author: pmario
name: New Style
readme:
This plugin bundles a small set of style refinements and one animation helper that polish the look of the default ''Vanilla'' and ''Snow White'' themes, plus a companion animation for the [[Underlined Tabs|$:/themes/wikilabs/underlinedtabs]] theme. It is theme-agnostic: where the contained CSS or JavaScript references classes that only the Underlined Tabs theme defines, the rules silently have no visual effect under other themes. !! What's included ;Underlined Tabs animation helper :A startup module that watches `.tc-tab-buttons` containers and tags the first tab with `tc-uit-anim-in` / `tc-uit-anim-out` ''only'' when its selected state actually flips — not when another tab is clicked (which also rebuilds the tab DOM). The matching keyframes ship with the Underlined Tabs theme. ;Snow White overrides :A replacement for `$:/themes/tiddlywiki/snowwhite/base` that tweaks border-radii and shadows for drop-downs, modals, alerts, notifications and the tiddler frame. Shadows the upstream tiddler of the same title. ;Vanilla base fixes :A small additional stylesheet (`$:/themes/wikilabs/vanilla/base-fixes`) that backports rule changes made to upstream `$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/base` after TiddlyWiki v5.4.0 — rounded buttons, palette-based colours for `.tc-btn-standard`, a hover state for sidebar-tools buttons, restored focus outline on the remove-tag button, a softer `.tc-subtitle`, larger tiddler-frame radius on wide screens, dropdown foreground colour, palette-based tree and thumbnail colours, and a few more. Loads ''after'' the bundled `base` so the new rules take effect. !! Important This plugin shadows a core stylesheet:
    <$list filter="[[$:/plugins/wikilabs/new-style]plugintiddlers[]prefix[$:/themes/tiddlywiki/]]" emptyMessage="none">
